EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The global permission "{object.value}" is revoked from the user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
The global permission "{object.value}" is revoked from the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The global permission "{object.new_value}" is granted to the user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
The global permission "{object.new_value}" is granted to the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
